response.original_title: 湯けむり近親相姦　母子入浴交尾
response.overview: Fuyuhiko had a strange habit: whenever his father was away on business trips, he would peek at his mother, Ayumi, while she was taking a bath. His mother, who was actually aware of her son's habit, called out to Fuyuhiko, who was peeking as usual, "Let's take a bath together." Fuyuhiko was taken aback by the suddenness of the situation, but from that day on, the bathroom became a forbidden place for the two of them.
response.tagline: The bathroom became their a forbidden place
response.title: 湯けむり近親相姦　母子入浴交尾
